title: vault-writer.md (writer-reference file) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for Vault Writers/<writer>.md writer-reference files. Per-writer definitions describing systems writing into the vault (connectors, agentic flows, auto-research, scheduled skills, custom). Relocated from pillar 7 (vault-writers-rules.json) to pillar 6 (file-type-contracts) per Plan 81 SP13 Session 5 L-58 SHAPE redistribution. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.7 (2026-05-18).
design_source: alignment/connector-reference-files.md Session 5 L-58 + L-69 + 'Writer-reference frontmatter contract (final)'

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh branch #3 (vault-writers-writer-reference-only — frontmatter conformance DENY on schema violation) + librarian writers-index-refresh / writers-overlap-refresh / writers-health-audit
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep with vault-writers-rules.json + templates

excluded_paths_rationale: Librarian-managed derived artifacts; writers_allowed: [librarian] enforced by branch #3 / branch #4 parallel pattern.

destinations_entry_shape.path_format: Mustache-substituted path; foundation-shipped variable namespace per Session 5 L-69 = {{date}}, {{title}}, {{slug}}, {{source_id}}. Paths MAY be outside vault root for raw-data staging cases (e.g., a Google Chat scrape writing structured records to ~/.claude/state/raw-data/gchat/messages.sqlite); the in-vault default applies to human-readable processed outputs like Meeting Notes per feedback_vault_writer_staging_architecture (default raw landing = outside-vault structured; in-vault markdown reserved for direct-read artifacts).

raw_retention.description: Per-writer raw retention policy. Additive optional. Mandatory-default for writer_kind in {agentic-flow, auto-research}; opt-in for direct-fetch connectors. Per writer-pipeline-layering.md L-97-L-98 / foundation-governance-target-state.md A60. Raw retention preserves pre-distillation transcripts/sources for replayability of LLM-driven writers, and serves as the 5-precaution substitute for the retired _landing/ folder convention (L-98).

partition_strategies.daily_jsonl: High-volume scrapers (gchat-scrape, teams-scrape pattern); one JSONL file per UTC date under $VAULT_WRITER_STATE_ROOT/raw/<writer-id>/<YYYY-MM-DD>.jsonl
partition_strategies.per_record_json: LLM-driven writers (meeting-processor, agentic-flow); one JSON file per source record under $VAULT_WRITER_STATE_ROOT/raw/<writer-id>/<source-id>.json

raw_retention.worm_immutability: Raw retention files are append-only or write-once-and-immutable; reconciler + doc-amender MUST NOT mutate raw files post-write. Daily integrity check via librarian writers-health-audit (per L-98 precaution #4).
raw_retention.manifest_link: Each write to a destination records raw_path in manifest.sqlite writes table (per T-24 writer-manifest-schema.json :: raw_path column). Reconciler step 8.6 populates this field from packet metadata.
raw_retention.backup_locality: Storage root $VAULT_WRITER_STATE_ROOT defaults to ~/.local/share/claude-stem/vault-writers/ (XDG-compliant; Time Machine / restic backup-included; per L-95 + L-98 precaution #5).
